articles.source_summary: Liberty Times (Liberty Times Net) is a Taiwanese digital news platform providing coverage of national and international news, politics, economy, and society. It serves a broad Chinese-speaking audience and is considered a mainstream media outlet in Taiwan. The platform operates as part of the Liberty Times Group, a privately owned media company, and is generally associated with a pro-independence editorial stance. Founded in 1980 as a print newspaper and later expanded online, it has developed into one of Taiwan’s most widely read news sources, offering continuous updates and multimedia content.

articles.title: Transgender Teen Athlete Speaks Out Ahead of Supreme Court Ruling
articles.summary: A transgender teen in West Virginia speaks out as the Supreme Court weighs a ruling that could end her high school track career.

articles.title: How one simple menu tweak can cut calories and carbon emissions
articles.summary: One 'largely unnoticed' change saw the likelihood of choosing a vegetarian meal rocket by over 40%
articles.source_summary: The Independent is a British online news outlet that covers national and international news, including politics, business, culture, lifestyle, and global affairs. It serves a broad English-speaking audience with a focus on digital journalism and multimedia content. The publication operates as a privately owned media organization under Independent Digital News & Media. Founded in 1986 as a print newspaper, The Independent was established to provide an alternative voice in the UK media landscape. It transitioned to a fully digital format in 2016, becoming one of the first major UK newspapers to cease print publication. The outlet is often described as having a center-left editorial perspective. Its reporting includes breaking news, analysis, opinion pieces, and feature stories. Through its global digital presence, The Independent reaches readers worldwide and contributes to public discourse on a wide range of political, social, and cultural issues.

articles.title: Tornado touches down in Minnesota while historic flooding threatens Wisconsin
articles.summary: Tornado touches down in Minnesota while historic flooding threatens Wisconsin A confirmed tornado tore through near Rochester, MN. It comes as Michigan and Wisconsin are dealing with severe flooding. The swollen Wisconsin River has led to concerns about the structural integrity of the levee in Portage, WI. NBC News’ Shaquille Brewster reports.
articles.source_summary: NBC News is a major American news organization that provides coverage of national and international news, including politics, business, health, technology, and culture. It serves a broad audience through television broadcasts, digital platforms, and mobile applications. The organization is owned by NBCUniversal, a subsidiary of Comcast, and operates as part of a large media network. Founded in 1940, NBC News has become one of the leading news providers in the United States, known for its reporting and multimedia journalism. It is generally considered mainstream and plays a central role in American media.

articles.title: Pandemic, 'ice epidemic' worsened Qld child safety pressures, ex-minister says
articles.source_summary: ABC News Australia is the national news division of the Australian Broadcasting Corporation, a publicly funded broadcaster providing comprehensive coverage of domestic and international news. It covers politics, business, science, health, and cultural topics, serving a broad Australian audience through television, radio, and digital platforms. As a public broadcaster, ABC operates under a statutory framework designed to ensure editorial independence and public service obligations. ABC News is widely regarded as a mainstream source within Australia’s media landscape. Its origins date back to the early 20th century with the establishment of the ABC, and its news division has evolved alongside developments in broadcasting technology. Today, it delivers breaking news, investigative reporting, and in-depth analysis, maintaining a central role in informing the public across the country.

articles.source_summary: Yicai Global is an English-language digital news platform that provides coverage of business, finance, and economic developments related to China and the global economy. It targets international investors, analysts, and readers interested in Chinese markets and policy trends. The outlet is affiliated with Yicai Media Group, which is linked to state-backed media organizations in China, and operates within the country’s media framework. Launched as the international arm of China Business Network, Yicai Global aims to present Chinese economic news to a global audience. It publishes reporting on financial markets, corporate activity, trade, and regulatory developments, along with analysis of macroeconomic trends. Over time, it has expanded its coverage and digital presence, offering insights into China’s evolving economic landscape. The platform serves as a bridge between Chinese business news and international readers, contributing to the global understanding of China’s economy and financial system.

articles.title: Эксперименты с искусственным интеллектом и дронами хотят упростить
articles.translated_title: Experiments with artificial intelligence and drones aim to simplify
articles.summary: Госдума на пленарном заседании 15 апреля приняла в первом чтении законопроект, который упростит тестирование новых технологий, связанных с искусственным интеллектом, беспилотниками и промышленными данными.
articles.source_summary: Parliamentary Gazette is a Russian newspaper and digital news platform affiliated with the Federal Assembly of Russia, providing coverage of legislative activity and public policy. The outlet reports on parliamentary proceedings, government decisions, legal developments, and political affairs, targeting policymakers, professionals, and the general public. It operates with state affiliation and reflects official perspectives within Russia’s media environment. Established in 1997, the publication was created to inform citizens about legislative processes and state activities. It has developed into a recognized source of information on government policy and parliamentary work. The website publishes news articles, official statements, and analysis related to legislation and governance. While not fully independent, it functions as a mainstream institutional outlet, contributing to public awareness of political developments and legislative activity in Russia.

articles.title: Rosner on Credit Markets Amid Geopolitical Tension
articles.summary: Lindsay Rosner, Head of Multi Sector Fixed Income at Goldman Sachs Asset Management, discuss the current state of credit markets amid geopolitical tensions and private credit challenges. Rosner highlights that while credit spreads remain tight, the all-in yield remains attractive to investors. She speaks with Katie Greifeld on “Real Yield.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.source_summary: Bloomberg is a global news organization and financial information provider that delivers coverage of business, markets, technology, politics, and economics. It serves professionals, investors, and general audiences through television, digital platforms, and data services. The company operates as a privately owned corporation founded by Michael Bloomberg and is headquartered in the United States. Established in 1981, it has become one of the world’s leading sources of financial news and data. It is generally considered mainstream and highly influential in global business journalism.

articles.title: Supreme Court reverses lower court ruling, hands Chevron victory in environmental lawsuit
articles.source_summary: Fox News is a major American cable news network and digital media platform that provides coverage of national and international news, politics, business, and entertainment. Launched in 1996 and owned by Fox Corporation, it is one of the most widely watched news networks in the United States. Fox News is known for its extensive political coverage, including live broadcasts, analysis, and opinion programming. Its website complements television content with breaking news articles, opinion pieces, and multimedia features. The network has a distinct editorial identity often associated with conservative viewpoints, while also delivering general news reporting. Fox News plays a significant role in the U.S. media landscape, influencing public discourse and reaching a broad audience through both broadcast and digital channels.

articles.title: Thomas, Alito not planning to retire from Supreme Court this year, sources say
articles.summary: Sources close to Supreme Court Justices Samuel Alito and Clarence Thomas tell CBS News neither is planning to retire this year.
articles.source_summary: CBS News is an American news division of CBS, a major television network owned by Paramount Global. It provides coverage of national and international news, focusing on politics, business, and public affairs. The outlet serves a global English-speaking audience through television broadcasts and digital platforms. Founded in 1927 as CBS Radio News and later expanding into television, CBS News has become one of the United States’ leading news organizations. It produces news programs, investigative reports, and live coverage of major events. Over time, it has expanded its digital presence, offering streaming services and multimedia content. The organization is widely regarded as mainstream. CBS News plays a significant role in global media, contributing to public discourse and information dissemination across multiple platforms.

It reports on topics such as politics, economy, business, sports, and culture, serving residents of Qatar and a wider international audience. The publication is owned by Gulf Publishing and Printing Company and is generally regarded as a mainstream outlet. Founded in 1978, it has developed into one of Qatar’s प्रमुख English-language newspapers, reflecting the country’s diverse expatriate population. Gulf Times operates across print and digital platforms, offering real-time updates and multimedia content. It plays a significant role in informing readers about developments in Qatar and the Gulf region, contributing to public awareness and media coverage in the country.

articles.source_summary: Aden Al Ghad is a news outlet based in Yemen that provides coverage of national and regional current events. It reports on topics such as politics, security, economy, and social issues, with a focus on developments in southern Yemen. The publication serves a general audience through its digital platform and is often described as opposition-oriented in its editorial perspective. Aden Al Ghad operates as a privately owned media organization within Yemen's media landscape. Established in the 2010s, it has developed during a period of political transition and conflict in the country. Over time, it has expanded its coverage and audience reach. Its content includes news reports, analysis, and opinion pieces related to Yemeni and regional affairs.

It operates under the U.S. Agency for Global Media and is affiliated with Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty, making it a publicly funded international broadcaster. The outlet targets Persian-speaking audiences in Iran and the diaspora, delivering news, analysis, and multimedia content. Launched in 2002, Radio Farda was established to provide alternative sources of information and has developed a strong digital presence alongside radio broadcasting. Its content includes news reporting, interviews, and cultural programming, contributing to access to information for Persian-speaking audiences.

articles.source_summary: Maeil Business is a major South Korean daily newspaper and digital news platform focused on business, finance, and economic policy. It provides coverage of corporate developments, markets, technology, and international economic trends, targeting professionals, investors, and policymakers. The publication is privately owned and is considered a mainstream outlet within South Korea’s financial media landscape. Founded in 1966, Maeil Business has played a significant role in reporting on the country’s rapid economic development and industrial growth. Its content includes news reporting, analysis, and opinion columns, available in both print and digital formats. The outlet maintains a strong influence in business journalism and economic discourse in South Korea.

articles.title: [기고] 에너지 안보는 저장에서 완성된다
articles.translated_title: [Op-Ed] Energy Security Is Achieved Through Storage
articles.summary:
중동의 군사적 긴장이 높아질 때마다 우리 사회는 먼저 가스 수급을 걱정한다. 천연가스는 발전·난방·산업생산을 떠받치는 기반 에너지이며, 국제 정세의 불안은 곧 국민경제의 비용과 생활 안정의 문제로 이어지기 때문이다. 최근 위기가 보여준 점도 분명하다. 국내 천연가스 수급 안정은 도입 계약 수치만으로 확보되지 않는다. 수입선 다변화와 국제 협력도 중요하지만, 위기 대응의 성패는 결국 국내 저장 여력과 운영 체계에 달려 있다. 한국가스공사의 저장시설이 다시 주목받는 이유다.
이 점은 대만 사례와 비교하면 더욱 선명해진다. 대만의 제한적 LNG 비축 여력이 TSMC 같은 전력 다소비 산업의 생산 차질 우려로까지 논의가 이어진다. 물론 한국과 대만의 제도와 전원 구성, 공급 구조를 단순 비교할 수는 없다. 그러나 메시지는 분명하다. 저장 여력이 얇으면 에너지 리스크는 곧 산업 리스크로 번진다. 반대로 한국은 장기간 축적한 저장시설과 위기 시 실제 수급 조정을 통해 대응해 온 경험을 갖고...
articles.source_summary: Seoul Shinmun is a South Korean daily newspaper and digital news platform based in Seoul. It provides coverage of national and international news, including politics, economy, society, and culture, serving a broad audience across the country. The publication includes news reporting, opinion pieces, and feature content, contributing to public discourse in South Korea. Seoul Shinmun operates as a privately owned media outlet with historical ties to earlier government-affiliated publications, and is considered part of the mainstream press. Founded in 1904 as one of Korea’s oldest newspapers, it has evolved through periods of political and social change. Over time, it has expanded its digital presence, offering online news and multimedia content. Its platform reflects its role as a longstanding source of news and information in South Korea.

articles.summary: SIMFEROPOL (Sputnik) - The planned rotation of International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) inspectors took place at the Zaporozhye Nuclear Power Plant, the plant's press service said on Friday.
